title: Solar Power Optimizer
summary: A system that optimizes solar panel output using predictive analytics and environmental data. - [Demo Validated]
background: Solar systems often operate below optimal efficiency because weather conditions and load patterns change throughout the day.
solution: The team designed a predictive optimization model that analyzes environmental inputs and recommends more efficient operating settings.
posterText: This project investigates how predictive analytics can improve solar panel performance and support sustainable energy management.

title: Robotics Therapy Assistant
summary: An assistive robotic concept designed to support rehabilitation and therapy activities.
background: Therapy and rehabilitation programs often require repetitive assisted movement and close supervision.
solution: The team designed an assistive robotics concept that supports rehabilitation workflows through guided actions.
posterText: This project explores how assistive robotics can support rehabilitation settings and reduce repetitive workload for care providers.

title: Campus Sustainability Dashboard
summary: A dashboard that visualizes campus energy, waste, and sustainability metrics in one place.
background: Sustainability initiatives often generate fragmented data across different systems.
solution: The team built a dashboard concept that consolidates sustainability metrics into a single interface.
posterText: The dashboard centralizes data related to energy use, waste management, and environmental initiatives for easier monitoring.

title: IoT Smart Irrigation Network
summary: An IoT-based irrigation system that adjusts watering schedules using sensor data.
background: Traditional irrigation practices often waste water and fail to respond to changing soil conditions.
solution: The team built a sensor-driven irrigation control network that automates watering decisions.
posterText: The project uses soil moisture and environmental sensors to improve irrigation efficiency and reduce water waste.
citations: Author H, 'Smart Irrigation with IoT Sensors,' 2024.

title: VR Education Explorer
summary: An immersive VR experience designed to teach complex biological concepts in high schools.
background: Traditional 2D textbooks often fail to engage students with 3D biological structures.
solution: The team built a VR environment that allows students to interact with 3D cellular models.
posterText: This project uses immersive VR to transform biological education and improve student engagement with complex science topics.
